channel.title: Posts on Ziniu Li
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Ziniu Li

item.title: Error Bounds of Imitating Policies and Environments (NeurIPS 2020)
item.description: This blog summarizes our work of error bounds of imitating policies and environments, which is presented at NeurIPS 2020.

item.title: Efficient Exploration by Novelty Pursuit (DAI 2020)
item.description: This blog summarizes our work of efficient exploration by novelty pursuit, which is presented at DAI 2020.

item.title: Self-Guided Evolution Strategies with Historical Estimated Gradients (IJCAI 2020)
item.description: This blog summarizes our work of self-guided evolution strategies with historical estimated gradients, which is presented at IJCAI 2020.
